We're so close, everyone.
Under pressure from Senator Hassan, corporate billionaire Betsy DeVos admitted that she was confused about whether the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act was a federal law. Now, the Senate is one vote away from keeping Mrs. DeVos from becoming Secretary of Education.
[**We need to keep the pressure on. Add your name to tell the Washington Republicans in the Senate NOT to confirm Betsy DeVos.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0a/2a380d31/141ed53b/fed719/3048593338/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/standagainstdevos?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201701_devos")

But the final vote will be on the Senate floor in the next couple of days, and we still need one more GOP Senator to step up and fight for strong public schools, not kowtow to Donald Trump's agenda.
[**Time is running out, everyone. name: Did You See? (via DSCC)
subject: Wanted to make sure you saw this (Supreme Court)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Did you see Senator Schumer's email? We need your voice in the Supreme Court fight. [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170202-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

Friend -- Did you see Senator Schumer's email? All of President Obama's nominees met the 60 vote threshold. Trump's nominee needs to do the same.

[**We need your voice in this fight. Will you chip in $1 to show Senate Democrats you're standing with them?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170202-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,
Team DSCC

\------------------
Forwarded message:
From: Chuck Schumer
Date: Wednesday, February 1, 2017
Subject: re: where we stand on Trump's Supreme Court pick

Friend --

Last night, President Trump named his pick to the Supreme Court.

Neil Gorsuch is a federal judge for the 10th Circuit in Colorado. He was appointed by George W. Bush. Throughout his career, he's repeatedly sided with corporations over working people, rejected women's rights, and embraced a retrograde judicial philosophy.

Senate Democrats are ready for this fight. We're going to demand an exhaustive, robust, and comprehensive debate on Judge Gorsuch's fitness to be a Supreme Court justice -- and just like President Obama's Supreme Court nominees who all met a 60 vote threshold in the Senate, we're going to insist on the same for this administration's nominees.

[**We just need you to add your voice to ours. Will you chip in $1 to show that we're all standing together?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170202-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

A little more than a week into the Trump presidency, and we've already seen how it's imperative to maintain an independent judiciary that can uphold the civil rights of those this administration tries to isolate and target.

If Judge Gorsuch won't demonstrate the type of independence necessary to defend the Constitution from abuses of the Executive branch, then we will oppose his confirmation.

**But to hold the line, we're going to need your help.**

In the days ahead, President Trump's allies will try to flood the airwaves to drown out the voices opposing this nomination. They'll spend millions of dollars attacking Democrats who represent our values in this debate.

We need to match their energy -- and their resources. If we do, we can show the entire country that we're galvanized in our opposition to the President's full agenda -- and blunt whatever momentum he's trying to build.

[**Donate $1 right now.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170202-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,
Chuck

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec23/2b07114c/44732abc/7369658e/177260612/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec23/2b07114c/44732abc/73696589/177260612/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Jeanie Forrester
subject: Important SCOTUS Update
body:
Derek,

Sens. Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan have repeatedly stated
their Senate colleagues must ‘do their jobs’ and hold an up or
down vote on Supreme Court nominees.

If they are true to their word they will stand up to the extreme
fringes and radical special interest financiers of the Democrat
Party and denounce loose talk of a filibuster of Judge Neil
Gorsuch.

But don’t hold your breath.

The truth is, Shaheen and Hassan pretty much do whatever their
liberal party leaders like Chuck Schumer and Elizabeth Warren
tell them to.

That’s why I need you to take action right now!

Sign our petition ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurv45nIYnI7dmsevTfdE5KIKBfrJ8zT9sCU16CQwBsRBD4N2Stwaa4PNM9BdN1JsrRw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MXG0p3e4P3-2Bvsnpxqm-2BQgECdJkqv-2ByLsfIAOG8r0Fy6uzJHSRh7vBZhCwcUiuzauVJCy9XXPRJ1FnTu2t8Er9btTkZLH8bCtWsfqrDr9-2Fzkbo2aHlg-2B2XpNYlLWA4IrCI4olvJDaIHxhvYAYdL5f5Jn59tA-2BsLvalqbzJeL7LOobmdz8l5-2BmiSodd-2FmwvkXegz4OvVBr92dEgCmH9rvIQ-2BPzLQ2KZNOLyOpcjJVyGi-2BzOXFHW-2FmPCVLPNP5fKLYwfSsFjHiWtR7hJHID7pStmBg-3D-3D ) to show
your support for Judge Neil Gorsuch and tell Jeanne Shaheen and
Maggie Hassan to stop the partisan games.

But don't stop there, call Shaheen's office at (202) 224-2841 (
tel:2022242841 ) and Hassan's office at (202) 224-3324 (
tel:2022243324 ) and tell them to do their jobs!

Sincerely,

Jeanie Forrester
Chairman

clean_body: Derek, Sens. Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan have repeatedly stated their Senate colleagues must ‘do their jobs’ and hold an up or down vote on Supreme Court nominees. If they are true to their word they will stand up to the extreme fringes and radical special interest financiers of the Democrat Party and denounce loose talk of a filibuster of Judge Neil Gorsuch. But don’t hold your breath. The truth is, Shaheen and Hassan pretty much do whatever their liberal party leaders like Chuck Schumer and Elizabeth Warren tell them to. That’s why I need you to take action right now! Sign our petition ( ) to show your support for Judge Neil Gorsuch and tell Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan to stop the partisan games. But don't stop there, call Shaheen's office at (202) 224-2841 ( tel:2022242841 ) and Hassan's office at (202) 224-3324 ( tel:2022243324 ) and tell them to do their jobs! body:
| | [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2317week2&n=1)
---
### [ ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2317week2&n=2)
---
Peter, Week two is in the books and President Trump is showing no sign of slowing down. He is working hard moving full steam ahead to Make America Great Again and drain the Washington D.C. swamp. The Administration is working hard to accomplish campaign promises dealing with healthcare, the economy, government ethics, and more. One of the major items being tackled is improving our immigrant screening process. Part of this work is to address our inadequate immigration vetting procedures. To ensure American safety the President imposed a temporary travel ban on 7 countries known for training, harboring and export terrorism. One of the major projects being undertaken is improving the vetting process for those entering the United States. This travel ban is not about religion **\- this is about keeping our country safe.** There are over 40 majority Muslim countries worldwide that are not affected by this order. The White House will again be issuing visas to all countries once the Administration has reviewed and implemented the more secure policies over the next 90 days. To learn more about the rest of the President's week and his work for the American people, just scroll.
* * *
****THIS WEEK
[](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fofficialteamtrump%2Fposts%2F1850158735273675&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2317week2&n=3)
****
* * *
**
**
* **Nominating A Well Qualified Pick For The Supreme Court

** President Trump has announced his nominee to fill the ninth seat of the Supreme Court. Judge Neil Gorsuch has built a nationally respected and distinguished judicial record and reputation. Gorsuch is a well qualified pick to uphold our Constitution and be a worthy successor to the late Justice Scalia, but don't take our word for it - [SEE WHAT THE CRITICS ARE SAYING](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fofficialteamtrump%2Fposts%2F1850158735273675&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2317week2&n=4).

* **Advocating for Lower Medical Costs & More Medical Jobs in the U.S.

**This week, President Trump met with pharmaceutical executives at the White House. US drug companies have produced extraordinary results for our country, but the pricing has been astronomical for our citizens. During the meeting, President Trump, focused on cutting regulations to encourage drug companies to bring back operations and jobs to The United States.

* **Putting Ethics Into Practice And Draining The Swamp

** President Trump wasted no time creating an executive order that will make every appointee in every executive agency sign an ethics pledge. By signing this pledge, these people are not allowed to engage in lobbying activities within 5 years of leaving their post and are not allowed to accept any gifts from registered lobbyists or lobbying organization. The days of cashing in on your political network and influence are limited, and President Trump is starting this practice right in his own administration.

* **Reducing Regulations - Big League

** On Monday, President Donald Trump signed an executive order that he said will “dramatically reduce federal regulations” on businesses. The President's executive order mandates that for every new regulation implemented by federal agencies, two existing regulations must be cut. The goal is to end the damaging effects of over-regulation on our small businesses, our economy and our entrepreneurial spirit. President Trump wants all Americans to know that the American dream is back, and we’re going to create an environment for small business like we haven’t had in many, many decades.

* **Supporting Our Troops
**
President Trump traveled to Dover Air Force Base on Wednesday to pay respects to a fallen hero, SEAL Team 6 member, Chief Petty Officer William "Ryan" Owens. President Trump was honored to be there for the dignified transfer and give thanks for his sacrifice. Owens took part in a daring raid that the Administration resulted in valuable intelligence that will protect American lives. “What he did for this nation and what we got out of the mission I believe will save lives,” said Press Secretary Sean Spicer.

* * *
In sum, Donald Trump’s first priority remains to protect and serve our Country while seeking out pragmatic ways to help those in need. And in doing so, First Amendment liberties of religious freedom and expression will not be compromised. **Join us in supporting President Trump as he signs and enforces constitutional executive orders to make America great again.** **Team Trump-Pence** [**P.S.** It's your LAST CHANCE to purchase select items from our store before we are completely out! Click here and go to the store before we sell out!](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcollections%2Flast-chance&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2317week2&n=5) [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcollections%2Flast-chance&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2317week2&n=6)

name: Team Maggie
subject: FWD: Jeff Sessions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello -- It looks like you haven't yet signed Senator Hassan's petition to say that you oppose the nomination of Senator Sessions for Attorney General.
Senator Sessions has a long and troubling history of standing against the human and civil rights of individuals -- rights that are essential to our civic and economic progress as a country -- and we wanted to make sure that you didn't miss a chance to make your voice heard.
[**Join Senator Hassan in saying that you're against the nomination of Senator Sessions for Attorney General by adding your name today.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0b/2a380d31/1413e166/fed742/3480905239/VEsH/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/voting-no-on-jeff-sessions?source=e20170202_sessions-kick_all")
Thank you for adding your voice,
Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
On Wednesday, February 1, 2017 at 2:26 PM, Maggie Hassan
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:
Hello,
If you want to know how important the role of the United States Attorney General is, look no further than Sally Yates. It is the responsibility and the duty of the Attorney General to serve all Americans, and Sally Yates stood up for what is right in ways that I do not believe that Senator Jeff Sessions would.
After reviewing Senator Sessions' record, his testimony before the Judiciary Committee, and reports of his influence on the development of President Trump's backdoor Muslim ban that will make our country less safe, I do not have confidence that Senator Sessions would be an independent Attorney General who would put the rights of all Americans before the whims of this President.
That is why I will be opposing his nomination for United States Attorney General.
[**If you agree, please sign my petition to say that you oppose the nomination of Senator Sessions for Attorney General.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0b/2a380d31/1413e166/fed742/3480905239/VEsE/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/voting-no-on-jeff-sessions?source=e20170202_sessions-kick_all")
This is not a matter of personal politics or party lines. Senator Sessions has a long and troubling history of standing against the human and civil rights of individuals, rights that are essential to our civic and economic progress as a country.
We thrive economically when we fully include every member of our community, and it's clear to me that Senator Sessions fails to grasp this concept. A GOP-led Judiciary committee once even refused to confirm him because of his questionable record on race, and his record of opposing equality for women and the LGBTQ community is equally concerning.
**His record makes it clear: Senator Sessions is unfit to serve as Attorney General.[If you agree, add your name.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0b/2a380d31/1413e166/fed742/3480905239/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/voting-no-on-jeff-sessions?source=e20170202_sessions-kick_all")**
Thank you for speaking up for what is right.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0b/2a380d31/1413e166/fed743/3480905239/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzAyMDFfc2Vzc2lvbnMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDIwMV9TZXNzaW9uc19hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/20170201_sessions?refcode=e20170201_Sessions_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0b/2a380d31/1413e166/fed74c/3480905239/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

body:
For weeks, voters from all over the country have been burning down the phone lines to ask their lawmakers to oppose DeVos. We need just ONE more Republican to stand up for our kids.

Friend --

The more we learn about Betsy DeVos, the clearer it is that she would be an unmitigated disaster for our school children.

When asked about laws protecting kids with disabilities, she was unaware that states are required to comply with federal law.

When asked about Trump's plan to ban gun free school zones, she suggested that firearms might be necessary to defend children from grizzly bears.

We've even learned that she may have plagiarized some of her answers to the questions she submitted to senators as part of the confirmation process.

The one thing that was clear from her nomination hearing was that Betsy DeVos is grossly unqualified to be put in charge of America's schools.

[**Chip in $1 to show that you're standing with Democrats in this fight to defeat this nomination and send a message to Republicans about the kind of grassroots support our candidates will have going forward.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-devos-vote?refcode=DPE-20170203-Rapid-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

For weeks, voters from all over the country have been burning up the phone lines to ask their lawmakers to oppose DeVos -- and it's working. This week, two Republican senators -- Susan Collins of Maine and Lisa Murkowski of Alaska -- said they will vote NO on her nomination.

We need just ONE more Republican to stand up for our kids. Otherwise DeVos can be confirmed in a 50-50 tie where Vice President Pence casts the winning vote in her favor. That's unprecedented, and we must stop them.

**So let's make it crystal clear to Senate Republicans that they'll be held accountable for this vote.[Click here to support Senate Democrats in this fight to protect the future of our children.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-devos-vote?refcode=DPE-20170203-Rapid-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
